title: Verify the full cancellation flow with acceptance of the 'Incentive Offer'
description: Tests that a user attempting to cancel is shown the loss aversion gate, proceeds to cancel, is presented with a discount offer, accepts it, and completes the payment to convert to a subscriber.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the Trial Corner cohort.
The 'Incentive Offer' is enabled in the backend.

steps.description: 3. In the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.
4. Observe the 'Incentive Offer' pop-up (e.g., 'Lock in 50% off your first month').
5. Click the primary action to 'Grab Offer'.
6. Complete the payment for the discounted first month.

expected_result: The user's trial remains active for the remaining duration, and their subscription is scheduled to begin at a discounted rate after the trial ends. A `cancel-clicked` event is fired from the discount pop-up.
